role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script identification and etymology.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant species and growth habits.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings and traffic rules.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Greek script clearly visible on the building.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Hills and vegetation match the description.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Trees and scrub are consistent with the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road markings and guardrails are accurately described.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The agents unanimously identified Greece based on strong linguistic evidence (Greek script) and corroborating landscape/regulatory cues. The judge correctly followed Path A (consensus) and made the right decision.
verdict.region_narrowing_notes: All five agents agreed on Greece (Europe) in Phase 1. The judge correctly identified this consensus and skipped the region hypothesis generation phase.
verdict.hypothesis_pool_notes: The pool consisted of the single correct country, Greece, which was the only plausible candidate given the definitive linguistic evidence.
